headline: 1-2' clean with fun sets. Aloha Friday — grab your longboard!
text: 8 am lowtide 1-2' breaking near shore, but some very fun sets coming through still. West wind keeping it very clean at Cocoa Beach's best surf spot. It's a beautiful Aloha Friday. Athena says get out there with your big boards.

headline: Cocoa Beach 2' and breaking near shore, but looks fun on the longboard. Light onshores with rainstorms coming in from offshore.
text: 2' and still breaking on the hightide, its a nice beach day but get it while it lasts.

headline: 3-4'+ blown out. Surfable if you're desperate.
text: Extreme onshore ENE winds, totally blown out. 3-4'+ and surfable if you're desperate, but springtime conditions prevail at lowtide report time.

headline: 3-4'+ with 20 kt+ wind gusts. Stay home and walk the dog.
text: Extremely windy, low tide incoming and a chopped up mess. Surfable, but doesn't look like much fun. Stay home and walk the dog.

headline: 2-3'+ wind driven victory at sea conditions.
text: A fast drift and maybe a surfable wave at high tide incoming at report time. Feels like a Monday, happy high holiday to those who celebrate.
